description: A property manager needs to collect and process an application fee from a prospective tenant.

nodes.task_description: Send the applicant a secure online link to pay the application fee.
Receive confirmation that the payment has been successfully processed.

expected_outcome.expected: Payment confirmation is received and logged.

nodes.task_description: Once payment is confirmed, initiate the tenant screening process.

expected_outcome.expected: The screening workflow is triggered after payment.
